concepts.name: Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A rectangular array of numbers or symbols.

concepts.name: Square Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A matrix with an equal number of rows and columns.

concepts.name: Determinant
concepts.short_definition: A scalar value that can be computed from the elements of a square matrix.

concepts.name: Minor
concepts.short_definition: The determinant of a submatrix obtained by deleting one row and one column.

concepts.name: Cofactor
concepts.short_definition: A minor multiplied by a sign determined by the position of the element.

concepts.name: Laplace Expansion
concepts.short_definition: A method to compute the determinant of a matrix using cofactors.

concepts.name: Singular Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix with a determinant of zero.

concepts.name: Non-singular Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix with a non-zero determinant.

concepts.name: Matrix Inverse
concepts.short_definition: A matrix that, when multiplied by the original matrix, results in the identity matrix.

concepts.name: Geometric Interpretation
concepts.short_definition: The determinant represents the scaling factor of the volume of a parallelepiped.
